meta.title: High School Students Learn To Secure Critical Infrrastructure
meta.description:
15 high school students spent 2 days learning how to hack and secure industrial control systems that run the critical infrastructure.

Matthew Luallen of Cybati performed the training at Seminole Ridge High School in Palm Beach County Florida. Then we brought Matthew, the teachers and students to the S4x17 Main Stage to see how it went.

Matt gives an intro, and then at 14:30 you get to hear from the students and teachers. It was a big success from all parties point of view, and you really see the students interest and learning.

The real question is how does this scale in what is taught and how many are taught
